title: RunEvent
description: One row from the append-only run_events table. Returned by GET /v1/runs/{run_id}/events and streamed by /events/stream.

event_id.description: Monotonically-increasing per-process insert order. Not stable across stores.

seq.description: Per-run monotonic sequence. Use with ?since_seq= to paginate without re-fetching.

kind.description: Event family. Common: start, delta, tool_call, tool_result, finish, error, cancelled. Open-ended; new kinds may appear without a schema bump.

payload.description: Event-specific fields. delta: {content}. tool_call: {server, tool, input}. tool_result: {tool, output, elapsed_ms}. start: {agent, sandbox, workspace} where sandbox is the symbolic 'local'|'remote' rather than an internal URL.
